sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7709" key="a)nau/xhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναύχην</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ενος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7709.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without neck</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throat,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
